product: Databricks Genie app for Slack (Public Preview)
tagline: The Databricks Genie app for Slack is now available in Public Preview.
what_it_does: The Databricks Genie app for Slack is now available in Public Preview. The app brings Genie into Slack so users can get answers to data questions without leaving Slack. Send a direct message to the app or mention @Genie in a channel or group DM, and answers route through Genie or a specific Genie Space that a channel owner has pinned.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
limitations: Triggering actions in Databricks from Slack
Creating Genie agents or Genie Agents.
key_takeaway: The Databricks Genie app for Slack is now available in Public Preview.
